statusTrace:
page = <Page url='http://localhost:8111/admin/editUser.html?userId=3&item=accessTokens#'>
user = CreateUserRequest(username='autotestuserhrlygu6w', password='TTBjwlu354$%', name='XWzO16 TyIX 98')
user_token_request = CreateUserTokenRequest(name='autotesttokenpAsyZAix')

    @pytest.mark.ui
    @pytest.mark.smoke
    @pytest.mark.regression
    @pytest.mark.admin_session
    def test_admin_can_create_access_token_for_user(
        page: Page,
        user: CreateUserRequest,
        user_token_request: CreateUserTokenRequest,
    ):
        (
            UsersPage(page)
            .open()
            .open_user(user)
            .open_access_tokens()
            .create_token(user_token_request)
            .should_show_created_token()
            .close_created_token_dialog()
>           .should_contain_token(user_token_request)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
        )

- text: XWzO16 TyIX 98
- table:
  - rowgroup:
    - row:
      - cell
      - cell
- table:
  - rowgroup:
    - row:
      - cell:
        - complementary:
          - link "General":
            - /url: /admin/editUser.html?init=1&userId=3&item=userGeneralSettings&init=1
          - link "VCS Usernames":
            - /url: /admin/editUser.html?init=1&userId=3&item=vcsUsernames&init=1
          - link "Groups":
            - /url: /admin/editUser.html?init=1&userId=3&item=userGroups&init=1
          - link "Notification Rules":
            - /url: /admin/editUser.html?init=1&userId=3&item=userNotifications&init=1
          - link "Access Tokens":
            - /url: /admin/editUser.html?init=1&userId=3&item=accessTokens&init=1
      - cell:
        - main:
          - text: "An access token can be used instead of a password in login forms or sent in the 'Authorization: Bearer' header when accessing"
          - strong: REST API
          - text: .
          - link "View help":
            - /url: https://www.jetbrains.com/help/teamcity/2026.1/?Managing+your+User+Account#Managing+Access+Tokens
            - img
          - link "Create access token":
            - /url: "#"
          - link "Close dialog window":
            - /url: "#"
            - img
          - heading "Create Access Token" [level=3]
          - text: Store the created token securely. This is the last time the token is displayed.
          - table:
            - rowgroup:
              - 'row "Token name: * autotesttokenpAsyZAix"':
                - 'rowheader "Token name: *"'
                - cell "autotesttokenpAsyZAix":
                  - 'textbox "Token name: *" [disabled]': autotesttokenpAsyZAix
              - 'row "Token value: eyJ0eXAiOiAiVENWMiJ9.ZENaS1Zzem9OREZvZXNkQWo2QkJWQmI1SFdp.MGJlMjQwMTktNWQwNi00MzFhLTlmMjItMmE1MDk2YzRmODE4"':
                - rowheader "Token value:"
                - cell "eyJ0eXAiOiAiVENWMiJ9.ZENaS1Zzem9OREZvZXNkQWo2QkJWQmI1SFdp.MGJlMjQwMTktNWQwNi00MzFhLTlmMjItMmE1MDk2YzRmODE4"
              - row
              - row
          - text: .
          - button "Create" [disabled]
          - text: Close .
